When to use:

Diagnose and improve persistence performance in Kotlin backend services. Use when fixing N+1 queries, slow transactions, connection pool exhaustion, Exposed DSL inefficiencies, Hibernate fetch plans, or R2DBC reactive pipeline bottlenecks.
